rawAssistant: Don't bother leaving so early when you haven't even checked that road for signs yet! Fresh mud and debris everywhere - it's a mess. Make sure to take a closer look at the one side road and see if there's anything out of the ordinary before heading off. You never know what might have been missed in the chaos.
